name: Events Demo 1
on: 
    pull_request:
       types:
         - opened
    workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Output event data
        run: echo "${{ toJson(github.event)}}"
      - name: Get Code
        uses: action/checkout@3
      - name: Install dependies
        run: npm ci
      - name: Test code
        run: npm run test
      - name: Build code
        run: npm build
      - name: Deploy project
        run:  echo " Deplyees"
